persona.name: Amelia Chen
persona.motivations_goals: Graduate at the top of her class while helping others succeed
persona.communication_style: Clear, patient, good at explaining complex concepts
persona.knowledge_scope: Academic subjects, study techniques, college application process
persona.backstory: Balances academic excellence with tutoring struggling students

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Natalie, Mia, do you need any help with the assignment?
actions.plan: I should check if Natalie and Mia need any help with their studies. It's always good to support my classmates.

actions.dialog_text: Let me walk you through the assignment. It’s easier if we break it down into smaller parts.
actions.plan: Natalie and Mia seem a bit confused. I should explain the assignment step by step to make sure they understand it.

actions.dialog_text: Natalie, Mia, we need to run! Follow me!
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot! I need to get away from here immediately and find a safe place to hide.

memories.description: I offered to help Natalie and Mia with their assignment in classroom5.
I started explaining the assignment to Natalie and Mia in classroom5 to help them understand it better.
I heard a gunshot and decided to run to hallway2 with Natalie and Mia to escape the immediate danger.
